caption: A woman with her hair in a high bun, wearing black headphones and a dark green t-shirt with a red circular graphic, is speaking into a black professional microphone. She is situated in a studio setting with a white wall behind her. To her left and right are framed images of a man, and behind her is a black banner featuring the white text "BOSS TALK 101", "It's A Unique Hustle", and "CAST", along with the phrase "About It!". Small red and white logos that read "BOSS TALK 101" are overlaid on the bottom left and right sides of the scene. As she speaks, her facial expressions shift slightly, moving from an open-mouthed speaking position to a more closed, contemplative expression with her eyes momentarily narrowing. The camera remains stationary, focusing on her upper body as she interacts with the microphone.
